name: Orichalcos Sword of Sealing
name_jp: オレイカルコスの<ruby lang="jp"><rb>魔</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>ま</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>封</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>ふう</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>剣</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>けん</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby>
desc:
The equipped monster's effects are negated. If you have a card in your Field Zone: You can target 1 Effect Monster you control; that Effect Monster gains this effect until the end of your opponent's turn. You can only use the previous effect of "Orichalcos Sword of Sealing" once per turn.
● Once per turn (Quick Effect): You can send 1 card from your hand to the GY, then target 1 face-up card on the field; destroy that target.

action: Sends from hand to Graveyard for cost
